Name: FAnimNode_ModifyBone
Description: Simple controller that replaces or adds to the translationrotation of a single bone.

Variables.Name: BoneToModify
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: Translation
Variables.Description: New translation of bone to apply.

Variables.Name: Rotation
Variables.Description: New rotation of bone to apply.

Variables.Name: Scale
Variables.Description: New Scale of bone to apply. This is only worldspace.

Variables.Name: TranslationMode
Variables.Description: Whether and how to modify the translation of this bone.

Variables.Name: RotationMode
Variables.Description: Whether and how to modify the translation of this bone.

Variables.Name: ScaleMode
Variables.Description: Whether and how to modify the translation of this bone.

Variables.Name: TranslationSpace
Variables.Description: Reference frame to apply Translation in.

Variables.Name: RotationSpace
Variables.Description: Reference frame to apply Rotation in.

Variables.Name: ScaleSpace
Variables.Description: Reference frame to apply Scale in.
